questions.statement: Which among the following is an example of progressive tax?
questions.explanation:
<p>A progressive tax is a tax in which the tax rate increases as the taxable amount increases.&nbsp;That means low tax imposed on low income earners compared to those with a higher income.</p>

<p>Excise duties, Octroi, House tax all are fixed but income tax is different for different earning people.</p>

options: <span style="color: rgb(33, 37, 41);">1 - d, 2 - c, 3 - a, 4 - b</span> /
<span style="color: rgb(33, 37, 41);">1 - c, 2 - d, 3 - a, 4 - b</span> /
<span style="color: rgb(33, 37, 41);">1 - b, 2 - a, 3 - c, 4 - d</span> /

questions.statement: Which one of the following is not a component of M<sub>1</sub> ?&nbsp;&nbsp;

options: <span style="color: rgb(33, 37, 41);">A - II, B - III, C - IV, D - I</span> /
<span style="color: rgb(33, 37, 41);">A - III, B - IV, C - II, D - I</span> /
<span style="color: rgb(33, 37, 41);">A - I, B - II, C - III, D - IV</span> /
<span style="color: rgb(33, 37, 41);">A - IV, B - III, C - II, D - I</span> /
Both Statement I and Statement II are true&nbsp; /
Both Statement I and Statement II are false&nbsp; /
Statement I is true but Statement II is false&nbsp; /
Statement I is false but Statement II is true&nbsp; /

questions.statement: Which of the following is not an assumption or conclusion of the inflation targeting approach ?&nbsp;
options: Interest rate is the major instrument of monetary policy&nbsp;&nbsp; /
Higher interest rate controls aggregate demand&nbsp;&nbsp; /
Inflation is a supply side phenomenon&nbsp;&nbsp; /
Quantity of money supply is not very effective in controlling inflation&nbsp; /

questions.statement: Which of the following is not true in the case of externality?&nbsp;&nbsp;
options: It is related to human interactions&nbsp;&nbsp; /
It is tied to consumer sovereignty&nbsp;&nbsp; /
It is based on higher order judgements of right and wrong&nbsp;&nbsp; /
